title: rubus × erinaceus
intro: Rubus × erinaceus, also known as the thimbleberry or hybrid thimbleberry, is a type of bramble shrub that belongs to the rose family (Rosaceae). This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antioxidant, and antimicrobial effects. The health benefits of Rubus × erinaceus include its ability to help manage diabetes, improve cardiovascular health, and reduce the risk of certain cancers. The plant can be prepared as a tea, tincture, or powder, and is often used in combination with other herbs in traditional herbal preparations.
